headline: Why Firefly Aerospace (FLY) Is Up 38.9% After Rapid VICTUS DIEM Launch Simulation Success
summary: In March 2026, Firefly Aerospace supported Lockheed Martin and the U.S. Space Force’s VICTUS DIEM mission, helping complete a rapid payload processing exercise in under 12 hours and a full responsive launch simulation within 36 hours, alongside partners Space Safari and Space Launch Delta 30. This rapid-turnaround work reinforces Firefly’s role in tactically responsive space and defense missions, complementing its growing backlog and high-margin software contracts such as the US$372 million...
